name: Elbmesh View Query Checks
summary: Checks that Views are rebuilt from Resource Events and Queries use declared View/index boundaries.

checks: Every changed View has declared source Events or explicit follow-up for manifest support.
Projection code ignores non-matching Event type, Resource type, schema, schema version, and non-Resource stream records.
List queries use declared indexes or ViewStore::list_by_index_prefix semantics.
View updates are rebuildable from Resource Events and do not mutate Resource state.
NATS KV checkpoints are described as target architecture unless code exists.
antiPatterns: Direct View writes from Actions as authoritative state.
Ad hoc query paths bypassing declared View/Query contracts.
Projection code performing external enrichment in v1.

items.text: Projection sources are Resource Events, not journals or trace records.
Projection dispatch ignores mismatched type/schema/resource/stream records.
ViewStore writes include deterministic ViewKey and declared indexes when list queries are needed.
Queries are declared capabilities against Views, not arbitrary runtime searches.

blocks.description: Current projection filtering and multi-Resource View tests.
Current ViewStore index prefix query tests.
